title: ageratina adenophoroides
intro: Ageratina adenophoroides, also known as the Mexican Mint or Hierba de San Andrés, is a perennial plant native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Ageratina adenophoroides include relief from digestive issues, such as bloating and gas, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce anxiety. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
